case_title: BAGUIO, CHATESS R. VS BARTLETT, DEBORAH

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BARTLETT, DEBORAH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAGUIO, CHATESS R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARTLETT, DEBORAH $406.28 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $428.28, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-17-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-13-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S SERVICE WAS UNTIMELY. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARTLETT, DEBORAH
